name: trivia_agent
description: A trivia host agent that fetches questions from Open Trivia DB across dozens of categories and difficulties, presents choices, and evaluates user answers.

skills.name: Trivia Quiz
skills.description: Ask trivia questions from 24 categories including science, history, sports, movies, music, and more at easy, medium, or hard difficulty.
examples: Give me a hard science trivia question
Ask me an easy sports question

skills.name: Answer Evaluation
skills.description: Evaluate whether a user's answer to a trivia question is correct and provide feedback.
examples: I think the answer is True
